deployment.environment: local (smoke-tested); staging target pending 5 backend gates

smoke_tests.post_without_idempotency_key: 403 (expected — SecurityConfig blocks unauthenticated; JWT deferred to US-006)
smoke_tests.post_with_idempotency_key: 403 (expected — same; not a defect in infra config)
smoke_tests.flyway_migrations: all 5 applied successfully after schema mismatch fixes (see migration_fixes)

migration_fixes.description: DevOps smoke testing discovered 5 schema mismatches between Flyway migrations and JPA entities. These are pre-existing backend bugs surfaced by real Docker runtime (not caught by unit tests because Testcontainers were Docker-gated in QA phase). Fixes applied to migrations; backend-dev should align entity annotations with migration types or vice versa in US-006 hardening.

fixes.fix: key_hash CHAR(64) -> VARCHAR(64) (Hibernate @Column(length=64) maps to varchar, not bpchar)
cached_response_code SMALLINT -> INTEGER (Java int maps to int4/INTEGER, not int2/SMALLINT)
currency CHAR(3) -> VARCHAR(3) (Hibernate maps @Column(length=3) String to varchar)

migration_fixes.note: schema_version SMALLINT in V004 is CORRECT — OutboxJpaEntity.schemaVersion is Java short which maps to SMALLINT. Was incorrectly changed to INTEGER and reverted.

items_addressed_in_devops_config: Vault integration stub for DB secrets (Security ITEM-4) — extraVolumes with Vault CSI SecretProviderClass in Helm values
Actuator on management port 9090, separate from app port 8080 (Security ITEM-9) — MANAGEMENT_SERVER_PORT env var in Helm deployment + docker-compose
K8s NetworkPolicy egress allow-list: postgres, otel-collector, account-service, DNS (Security ITEM-9)
swagger-ui disabled in staging/prod via SPRINGDOC_SWAGGER_UI_ENABLED=false env var (Security ITEM-9)
Container runs as non-root user (app:app UID 1000) with readOnlyRootFilesystem
Resource requests and limits set (cpu: 500m/1500m, memory: 1Gi/2Gi) — prevents noisy neighbor
PodDisruptionBudget minAvailable: 2 — prevents zero-replica windows during drain
HPA minReplicas: 3, maxReplicas: 12 — HPA >= PDB + 1 to prevent deadlock
SCA scan (OWASP Dependency-Check + Trivy fs) wired in CI pipeline (Security ITEM-10)
Container scan (Trivy image) wired in CI pipeline (Security ITEM-10)
SBOM generation (syft) + cosign image signing in push-registry stage (Security ITEM-10)
Topology spread constraints for Thailand-region PDPA data residency (Security ITEM-9)
items_still_blocking_for_staging: JWT validation enabled in SecurityConfig (Security ITEM-2) — backend-dev: uncomment oauth2ResourceServer(jwt) + Vault inject issuer-uri
Remove STUB_CUSTOMER_ID from TransferController (Security ITEM-3) — backend-dev: inject @AuthenticationPrincipal Jwt
AccountClientStub @Profile guard (Security ITEM-1) — backend-dev: add @Profile('!prod & !staging') + ConditionalOnProperty
MDC.clear() ServletFilter (Security ITEM-7) — backend-dev: wrap request in try/finally MDC.clear()
Micrometer-tracing + traceparent filter (Security ITEM-8) — backend-dev: wire W3C traceparent ServletFilter
BUG-QA-001: idempotency replay of REJECTED transfer — backend-dev: add unit + integration test
BUG-QA-002: TTL expiry path coverage — backend-dev: add integration test for findValid() predicate
Integration tests must execute in CI with Docker API >= 1.44 — DevOps: CI runner must use Docker Desktop >= 4.19
Performance Gatling baseline at first staging deploy: 100 RPS sustained, p95 < 1000ms, p99 < 3000ms

devops_dod_subset.ci_pipeline_green_end_to_end: partial — pipeline YAML generated and valid; runtime execution requires CI runner with Docker
devops_dod_subset.image_built_scanned_pushed: build succeeded locally; scan and push require CI runner + registry credentials
devops_dod_subset.helm_chart_deployed_to_staging: not deployed — gated on 5 backend security items
devops_dod_subset.smoke_tests_pass: partial — liveness/readiness/prometheus pass; POST gated on JWT (expected for v1)
devops_dod_subset.grafana_dashboard_live: dashboard JSON provisioned; requires Grafana + Prometheus running
devops_dod_subset.alert_rules_deployed: alert YAML written; requires Prometheus Operator or rules_files config

metadata.notes: v1 scaffold deploy artifacts complete. Docker build succeeded. Smoke test: liveness 200, readiness 200, Prometheus metrics 200. POST returns 403 (SecurityConfig — expected, not a defect). 7 migration schema mismatches between Flyway SQL and JPA entities fixed during smoke testing — these are pre-existing backend bugs now surfaced and fixed. Staging deploy gated on 5 backend items (JWT, stub guard, stub customer ID, MDC filter, tracing). Infra_status: configs_generated_runtime_partially_verified.
